channel.title: Vale.Rocks Photography
channel.description: Photos I have taken presented for one's viewing pleasure.

item.title: Gazebo with a picturesque background at the zoo.
item.description: A small, dark-roofed gazebo on a path. Behind it is foliage, landscaping, and a few other small structures. In the far background is a huge green hill under a blue sky peppered with clouds.

item.title: A painted stork near a pond.
item.description: A large white bird with black flight feathers and a long yellow beak stands near a pond surrounded by lush green foliage. Its head is bald and pinkish, and it has a tag on one of its pink legs.

item.title: An emerald tree skink on a branch.
item.description: A close-up of a vibrant green lizard with shiny, scale-covered skin resting on a tree branch. The background is blurred leaves and wood.

item.title: A cat lying next to a capybara.
item.description: A cat and a capybara lying down on a sunlit, shaded patch of concrete. The cat is stretched out in the foreground, while the capybara is resting near a stone wall in the background. Both animals appear relaxed and undisturbed by each other.

item.title: An axolotl resting.
item.description: A close-up of a pale axolotl with pink external gills, resting on rocks in a dark little alcove.

item.title: Mountains viewed across the water from a road.
item.description: In the foreground is a road, with grass and shrubs edging it. Behind it is water that reflects mountains and the blue sky behind it. One of the mountains is taller and snow-capped; the other is more green.

item.title: Moss and lichen growing on a branch.
item.description: In the foreground is a brown branch with textured bark, green moss, and lichen. The background shows a forest out of focus.

item.title: A tiny little plant growing up from an ant hill.
item.description: A close-up of a small plant growing up from some sand which constitutes an ant hill. The plant is small with green blades, and in the foreground is lots of natural grey detritus with the background showing some grey tubs.

item.title: A sheet of sandpaper through a microscope.
item.description: A microscopic close-up of a sheet of sandpaper. You can see individual yellow grains of sand caught by the light. Some grains are semi-translucent.

item.title: An LCD screen through a microscope.
item.description: A microscopic close-up of an LCD screen. You can see individual red, green, and blue subpixels in a grid. The edges of the photo are darkened and slightly blurred.
item.content:encoded: This is the screen of my Casio Classpad II (fx-CP400) displaying pure white.

item.title: A porcelain rooster bathed in candle light.
item.description: A close-up of a porcelain rooster bathed in candle light. The rooster has brown feathers, red comb, and yellow beak.

item.title: A weathered, pitted statue of a person carrying something.
item.description: A close-up of a white statue of a person carrying something over their shoulder. The statue is very pitted and weathered and behind it is the green foliage of a garden. The sky can be seen between the leaves.

item.title: Waves smashing around a rock at a beach.
item.description: A picture of the ocean at a beach. In the foreground are some vibrant shallows interspersed with rocks. The water is so clear and colourful it is almost green in places. Just right of the centre is a large rock being smashed from behind by water, sending a wave up into the air. In the background is a very clear blue sky.

item.title: A rearview mirror reflecting the roadside.
item.description: Central is a rear-view mirror that is reflecting the trees and landscape behind it. Seen in the background is the road, more trees, and various vehicles. The entire photo is slightly hazy.
item.content:encoded: Something about this photo feels just a tad off. The emptiness and simplicity of the landscape feels almost surreal. Very much Liminal Space-y.

item.title: A New Holland Honeyeater sitting on a chair.
item.description: A New Holland Honeyeater sits to the right of the frame. It has bright yellow patches on its wings and a spotty striped pattern of black and white down its front. Behind it is a large tree, a shed, various other structures, and various trees and greenery.
item.content:encoded:
My mother and I went to The Berry Farm which was swarming with New Holland Honeyeaters and Blue Wrens. As we sat at the cafe, the birds would dive down to steal people’s berry jams if they left them unattended for even the briefest of moments.

I managed to take this picture as a bird ‘sat’ on the chair at the end of our table.

item.title: A tiny waterfall going over a rock.
item.description: Roiling water cascading over the side of a rock. Behind it is the turbulent blue sea, with the clear, lighter blue sky behind it.

item.title: A grasshopper sitting on a grey tub.
item.description: Central is a green grasshopper with red eyes. It is sitting on a grey tub, and in the background is some deep green foliage.

item.title: A set of rocks forming a pool and window of the ocean.
item.description: The ocean at a beach. In the foreground are large rocks, forming a pool of sorts containing orange-red seaweed. Beyond it, the turquoise sea can be seen, spotted with rocks, with the clear, blue sky over it.

item.title: Looking through the trees at Boranup Forest.
item.description: Looking through Australian bush. The bottom third is comprised of green ferns and shrubbery. Above that, you can see the trunks of trees wrapped in bark of varying shades. Towards the top, you can see patches of blue sky showing through the canopy.

item.title: A panorama of Boranup Forest's trees and scrub.
item.description: A wide panorama of Aussie bush. The bottom third is comprised of green ferns and shrubbery. Above that, you can see the trunks of trees wrapped in bark of varying shades. Towards the top, you can see patches of blue sky showing through the canopy.

item.title: A Blue Periwinkle on a pitted rock.
item.description: A little blue periwinkle sitting central on a large pitted rock. The rock has hues of orange where the light is hitting it but is otherwise grey.

item.title: A rock showing its true colours thanks to being soaked in water.
item.description: A close up of a small, wet rock. There are patches of different colours including a purply-red, orange, white, yellow, and various greys. It is sitting in black dirt, and there are various plants around it. The plants in front of it have pink leaves, and the ones behind it back have green leaves.

item.title: A fuzzy little plant growing in the garden.
item.description: A close up of a little plant with a very fuzzy coat. On the ground is some dark mulchy dirt and in the background are some blurred plants.

item.title: A purple flower attached to a plant.
item.description: A close-up of a purple flower with a bright yellow stamen attached to a leafy green plant. More bush is visible blurred in the background.

item.title: A ladybird sitting on a plant.
item.description: A shallow depth of field close-up of a red ladybird sitting on a dried seedpod of a rosemary plant.

item.title: A bee on a pink flower.
item.description: A close-up of a bee who is face-first into a pink flower. The flower is attached to a succulent with deep green leaves.

item.title: A red monochrome photo of a spider sitting in its web.
item.description: The corner of a patio filled with spider's web, with the black sillohete of a spider sitting in the centre. The entire photo is monochrome red.
item.content:encoded: The red colour of this photo wasn’t done in post, but was instead a result of a coloured bulb positioned next to the spider.

item.title: A lone light bulb at night.
item.description: A warm light bulb sitting in the middle of the shot, with green plants and vines illuminated around it. In the very background, the slightly purple sky can be seen.

item.title: A screw with tiny plants and moss growing around it.
item.description: Some grey wooden boards with a recessed screw in the middle. Out from around the edges of the screw, a small green plant and some moss are growing.

item.title: A red leaf sitting on top of a pile of woodchips.
item.description: A bright, slightly curled red/orange leaf sitting in the middle of some dark brown woodchips.

item.title: A pomegranate fruit growing on the shrub.
item.description: A close-up of a brown pomegranate fruit with patches of blue sky and twigs from the shrub out of focus behind it.

item.title: A snake named George relaxing on a stick.
item.description: A close-up of a snake's head on a barkless stick. His underneath is white, and his top is brown with patches of a cream colour. The background is black.

item.title: Sunflower against the dulling evening sky.
item.description: A close-up of a sunflower, taken from down low. In the background is a slightly cloudy sky, a frame, and the warm lights of a patio.

item.title: Bright green, moist moss growing vertically.
item.description: A shallow depth of field close-up of green moss growing vertically. It is moist, with tiny beads of water covering it, and more moss can be seen in blurred semi-darkness in the background.

item.title: A majestic butterfly.
item.description: A close-up of a butterfly with a yellow body and black wings containing a green and yellow pattern. It is sitting on a green leaf, and behind it is more, out of focus, plant life surrounds it.

item.title: A frog chilling amongst ferns.
item.description: A dark close-up of some green ferns. Nestled to the right is a chill brown frog, being chill.

item.title: A panoramic photo of a walk track.
item.description: A panorama showing a peninsula covered in green scrub. To the sides, the sea is visible, to the left a rocky escarpment, and to the right various islands. Directly ahead is a wooden path. Above are patches of blue sky showing through cloud.

item.title: Two-headed mushroom growing among moss and tiny sprouts.
item.description: A closeup of a tiny yellow mushroom with two heads growing among some red and green moss. Among the moss are tiny little sprouts popping up.

item.title: A valley surrounded by mountains.
item.description: A valley, with mountains surrounding it and big, rolling clouds filling the blue sky. The middle of the valley is quite lush and green, but the mountains are yellowed and snow-covered.

item.title: A snowy mountain semi-concealed by cloud.
item.description: A large snowy mountain range half concealed by clouds. Some of the blue sky can be seen behind the mountains, and there are shrubs in the foreground.

item.title: A path winding through trees.
item.description: A dirt path winding through lush green trees. Some of the ground is covered in moss, and there are thick wooden beams creating a set of stairs.

item.title: A tree with pretty pink leaves growing in front of a house against a clear blue sky.
item.description: A small tree with pink leaves grows in front of a grey house. The sky behind it is clear and blue.

item.title: View of mountains near Queenstown.
item.description: A wideshot of snow-capped mountains, with a valley sparsely populated with houses at the base. The sky is blue and clear.

item.title: The town, forest, lake, and mountains of Queenstown from the gondola.
item.description: A high, wide shot of Queenstown. In the front centre is the main town, with a forest to the left, a lake in the centre that wraps around to the right, and the rest of the town with snow-capped mountains behind it lies beyond.

item.title: Queenstown across a lake with snowy mountain peaks in the background.
item.description: A wide shot of Queenstown across a lake. The sky is cloudy, and behind the town are mountains with snow-capped peaks.

item.title: Tiny sprouts growing up from the top of a moss-covered log.
item.description: A closeup of small green shoots growing up from a moss-covered log. The moss is brown and green, and the photo is very vibrant and saturated.

item.title: A fungal growth on the side of a moss-covered log.
item.description: A closeup of a brown mushroom growing ontop of a carpet of moss, which itself is growing on a fallen log. The moss is green, almost fluorescent, and a forest can be seen in the background. The photo is very vibrant and saturated.

item.title: A mushroom growing, nestled in a mossy alcove.
item.description: A closeup of a small mushroom growing in a little mossy alcove. The moss is brown and green, and the photo is very vibrant and saturated.

item.title: A fungal growth on a moss-covered log.
item.description: A closeup of a wavy brown mushroom on the side of a fallen log. The log is covered in brown and green moss, and the photo is very vibrant and saturated.
